case_title: SHANIKA WALKER VS. ANGEL ANTONIO PORTILLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-08-2018 CONTINUED TO SEP-19-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-19-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100047834)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-30-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
